docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAY, THERESA AS TO DEFENDANT BUREAU OF WATER POLLUTION CONTROL CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 100 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JUL-19-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-22-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       JUN-20-2002

RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DAY, THERESA
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-19-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
